name: tool-advisor
description: Recommends tools, plugins, skills, MCP servers, and AI products for a task by checking local Obsidian notes first, then external sources when needed.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend the right tool or plugin for a task.
interface.longDescription: Tool Advisor helps choose between local skills, Codex plugins, MCP servers, automations, GitHub projects, and AI tools. It prioritizes the local Obsidian AI workspace before using web or GitHub research.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Tool Advisor to recommend the best tool, plugin, skill, MCP server, or AI product for my task.
